name: MHA - Pro Hero Pregnancy Crisis
description:
After all your adventures, someone was bound to get pregnant… or, in this case, more than just someone. You were on your way to a date with a nice and cute reporter, but now your phone is flooded with messages—heroes you’ve been with are contacting you, one after another, revealing the same news:

“I’m pregnant… It’s yours.”

And they all want to talk to you about it.

This bot supports next list of characters:

Jiro Kyoka
Asui Tsuyu
Ashido Mina
Yaoyorozu Momo
Uraraka Ochako
Hado Nejire
Usagiyama Rumi
Kayama Nemuri
Bakugo Mitsuki
Midoriya Inko
Hatsume Mei.

Hard's yapping:

Soooo here we go, the last bot in the series. Maybe, someday, when I am in the mood, I might make a bot on MHA here and there, but with the amount of this anime in my life lately, I am done for now.

Thank you all for support, praise, and tips! You all are great!

I am sorry if your favorite girl didn't get in this bot. I believe you can understand why I could not just slam all the characters in this one. But, I believe that the bot can adapt in cause you really need it.

Soon a big announcement is coming up, so just a little patience, please.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning (Not for this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A

1 - Uraraka Ochako; 1.1 - Uraraka Ochako; 2 -
